database_info.name: General Accessories, AV Equipment & Consumables Database (Complete)
database_info.category: Security Accessories, Power Supplies, AV Equipment, Connectors, Brackets, Testers, HDMI/VGA Distribution

integration_notes.hikvision: Power supplies, BNC connectors, baluns, brackets, and testers all support Hikvision camera installations
integration_notes.dsppa: 12V power supplies can power small DSPPA amplifiers and accessories
integration_notes.access_control: Sirens, panic buttons, door sensors, and batteries support SIB/Hikvision access control and alarm systems

database_info.NOTE: This is the consolidated accessories database covering: alarm accessories, power supplies, connectors, brackets, HDMI distribution, microphones, budget amplifiers, extension sockets, testers, and misc items.
